hero_subtitle: SFTY gives executives and board members a unified view of compliance risks workflows and audit evidence to streamline oversight and strengthen operational control.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive visibility fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Boards and senior leaders struggle to maintain a clear view of risk exposure when compliance data remains fragmented across multiple providers and systems. This limits their ability to oversee operational risk, audit readiness and regulatory reporting with confidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes provider data, risk signals, case status and audit evidence into a single operating view so executives and boards can monitor compliance workflows with clear oversight and decision confidence.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to board visibility
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates compliance checks, routes cases, records decisions and prepares evidence to deliver clear operational risk visibility for executive and board review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that unifies compliance data, decisions, evidence and reporting for clear, audit-ready visibility across risk and operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP executives with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment to strengthen risk oversight and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide compliance visibility for VASP boards
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows give boards operational oversight
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports executive risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider outputs to board reports
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling clear executive visibility over risk, cases, and compliance decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY give boards compliance visibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates compliance data, case status, alert triage, and risk exposures into customizable dashboards, giving boards a comprehensive, real-time view of operational compliance and risk metrics.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves full case histories, decision logs, regulatory rule changes and supporting evidence, supporting audit readiness and traceability for both internal and external reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with your existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting providers to connect outputs without disrupting current tools or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as an operational layer above existing providers, organizing their outputs into auditable workflows without replacing underlying KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule solutions.
final_title: Bring compliance risk and audit visibility together
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports board-level oversight with connected views of compliance workflows, risk exposures and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
